originalPrompt: Navigate to the kanban board at http://localhost:3000. Find the first card in the "To Do" column. Click the "More options" button (the three dots icon) on that card to open the dropdown menu. Click "Delete" from the dropdown. Assert that the card is no longer visible in the "To Do" column.
reviewReasoning: The test tried to click a 'More options' dropdown button that no longer exists in the UI. The application was updated to replace the dropdown menu with a direct delete button (trash icon) on the card. The test instruction is stale and needs to be updated to reflect the new UI.
